options.name: --filepath
options.description: Path to the LivingDoc Json Output

options.name: --runtimeInformationPath
options.description:
Path to the RuntimeInformation.json from
*.Action.WebApplikation or
WinFormsApplikation-Plugin

options.name: --reportlanguage
options.description:
(Default: de) Language of generated Report
(de, en)

options.name: --reportName
options.description:
(Default: report.html) Name of the generated
HTML Report

options.name: --workItemPrefix
options.description: Prefix of the Tag for Link to WorkItem

options.name: --workItemUrlTemplate
options.description:
Url-Template link to the Backlog-Management
Tool

options.name: --reportHeader
options.description: Name of the header to generate for report

options.name: -e
options.description: Handle status unkown in report as error

options.name: --excludeTags
options.description:
Features and Scenarios tagged with this tags
are exclued from the report. Separate multiple
tags with a comma. Example: @Sprint2,@Sprint4
